en: I drank too much last night, God fails to pay, my head just feels in pain
ko: 어젯밤에 너무 많이 마셨어, 신은 보답하지 않아.

en: I miss the bus and there'll be hell today, I'm late for work again
And even if I'm there, they'll all imply that I might not last the day
ko: 출근해도 다들 내가 오래 못 버틸 거라고 암시하겠지.

en: And then you call me and it's not so bad, it's not so bad
ko: 하루를. 그때 네가 전화해주면 그렇게 나쁘지 않아, 그렇게 나쁘지 않아.

en: And I want to thank you for giving me the best day of my life
And oh, just to be with you is having the best day of my life
ko: 그저 너와 함께 있는 것만으로도 내 인생 최고의 날이야.

en: Push the door, I'm home at last, and I'm soaking through and through
And then you handed me a towel, and all I see is you
